turns.query: Help me analyze when Jingye Metallurgical Technology Co., Ltd. has the highest NOx emissions during 2025-06-10 to 2025-06-12.
turns.actual_response:
敬业冶金技术有限公司在 2025-06-10 至 2025-06-12 期间，NOx 小时排放峰值出现在 2025-06-12 19:00:00，峰值为 253.669 kg，距 2025-06-10 00:00 为 67 小时。

该时段共覆盖 72 条有效小时记录，NOx 排放总量为 13668.200 kg，小时平均排放量为 189.836 kg。
code_snippets:
import pandas as pd
from sqlalchemy import text

start_ts = "2025-06-10 00:00:00"
end_ts = "2025-06-13 00:00:00"

# 先定位“Jingye Metallurgical Technology Co., Ltd.”对应企业，并检查窗口内小时记录数量
candidate_sql = text("""
WITH candidates AS (
  SELECT id, name,
         CASE
           WHEN lower(name) = lower('Jingye Metallurgical Technology Co., Ltd.') THEN 1
           WHEN name LIKE '%敬业%' AND (name LIKE '%冶金%' OR name LIKE '%金属%') AND (name LIKE '%科技%' OR name LIKE '%技术%') THEN 2
           WHEN lower(name) LIKE '%jingye%' AND lower(name) LIKE '%metallurgical%' THEN 3
           WHEN name LIKE '%敬业%' AND (name LIKE '%冶金%' OR name LIKE '%科技%' OR name LIKE '%技术%') THEN 4
           ELSE 9
         END AS rank
  FROM polluting_company
  WHERE lower(name) = lower('Jingye Metallurgical Technology Co., Ltd.')
     OR (name LIKE '%敬业%' AND (name LIKE '%冶金%' OR name LIKE '%金属%' OR name LIKE '%科技%' OR name LIKE '%技术%'))
     OR (lower(name) LIKE '%jingye%' AND (lower(name) LIKE '%metallurgical%' OR lower(name) LIKE '%technology%'))
),
ranked AS (
  SELECT id, name, rank,
         COUNT(*) OVER() AS candidate_count,
         ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY rank, id) AS rn
  FROM candidates
)
SELECT r.id, r.name, r.candidate_count, r.rank,
       COUNT(h.id) AS hourly_record_count
FROM ranked r
LEFT JOIN hourly_polluting_company_emission h
  ON h.company_id = r.id
 AND h.timestamp >= :start_ts
 AND h.timestamp < :end_ts
WHERE r.rn = 1
GROUP BY r.id, r.name, r.candidate_count, r.rank
""")
candidate = pd.read_sql(candidate_sql, engine, params={"start_ts": start_ts, "end_ts": end_ts})

if candidate.empty or int(candidate.loc[0, "hourly_record_count"]) == 0:
    peak_nox = None
    total_nox = None
    mean_nox = None
    peak_nox_offset_hours = None
    print("未找到匹配企业，或该企业在指定时段内无小时NOx记录。")
else:
    company_id = int(candidate.loc[0, "id"])
    stats_sql = text("""
    WITH period AS (
      SELECT timestamp, nox
      FROM hourly_polluting_company_emission
      WHERE company_id = :company_id
        AND timestamp >= :start_ts
        AND timestamp < :end_ts
        AND nox IS NOT NULL
    ),
    agg AS (
      SELECT COUNT(*) AS n, SUM(nox)::float AS total_nox, AVG(nox)::float AS mean_nox, MAX(nox)::float AS peak_nox
      FROM period
    ),
    peak AS (
      SELECT timestamp AS peak_timestamp, nox AS peak_nox
      FROM period
      ORDER BY nox DESC, timestamp ASC
      LIMIT 1
    )
    SELECT a.n, a.total_nox, a.mean_nox, a.peak_nox,
           p.peak_timestamp,
           FLOOR(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (p.peak_timestamp - TIMESTAMP :start_ts)) / 3600)::int AS peak_nox_offset_hours
    FROM agg a CROSS JOIN peak p
    """)
    stats = pd.read_sql(stats_sql, engine, params={"company_id": company_id, "start_ts": start_ts, "end_ts": end_ts})
    peak_nox = float(stats.loc[0, "peak_nox"])
    total_nox = float(stats.loc[0, "total_nox"])
    mean_nox = float(stats.loc[0, "mean_nox"])
    peak_nox_offset_hours = int(stats.loc[0, "peak_nox_offset_hours"])
    print({
        "匹配企业数量": int(candidate.loc[0, "candidate_count"]),
        "采用企业": candidate.loc[0, "name"],
        "有效小时记录数": int(stats.loc[0, "n"]),
        "NOx峰值_kg": peak_nox,
        "NOx总量_kg": total_nox,
        "NOx小时均值_kg": mean_nox,
        "NOx峰值时间": str(stats.loc[0, "peak_timestamp"]),
        "峰值距2025-06-10_00时的小时数": peak_nox_offset_hours
    })

# 修正时间参数转换语法，继续基于已定位企业计算统计量
stats_sql = text("""
WITH period AS (
  SELECT timestamp, nox
  FROM hourly_polluting_company_emission
  WHERE company_id = :company_id
    AND timestamp >= CAST(:start_ts AS timestamp)
    AND timestamp < CAST(:end_ts AS timestamp)
    AND nox IS NOT NULL
),
agg AS (
  SELECT COUNT(*) AS n, SUM(nox)::float AS total_nox, AVG(nox)::float AS mean_nox, MAX(nox)::float AS peak_nox
  FROM period
),
peak AS (
  SELECT timestamp AS peak_timestamp, nox AS peak_nox
  FROM period
  ORDER BY nox DESC, timestamp ASC
  LIMIT 1
)
SELECT a.n, a.total_nox, a.mean_nox, a.peak_nox,
       p.peak_timestamp,
       FLOOR(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (p.peak_timestamp - CAST(:start_ts AS timestamp))) / 3600)::int AS peak_nox_offset_hours
FROM agg a CROSS JOIN peak p
""")

stats = pd.read_sql(stats_sql, engine, params={"company_id": company_id, "start_ts": start_ts, "end_ts": end_ts})

if stats.empty or int(stats.loc[0, "n"]) == 0:
    peak_nox = None
    total_nox = None
    mean_nox = None
    peak_nox_offset_hours = None
    print("该企业在指定时段内无有效小时NOx记录。")
else:
    peak_nox = float(stats.loc[0, "peak_nox"])
    total_nox = float(stats.loc[0, "total_nox"])
    mean_nox = float(stats.loc[0, "mean_nox"])
    peak_nox_offset_hours = int(stats.loc[0, "peak_nox_offset_hours"])
    peak_nox_timestamp = stats.loc[0, "peak_timestamp"]
    print({
        "采用企业": candidate.loc[0, "name"],
        "有效小时记录数": int(stats.loc[0, "n"]),
        "NOx峰值_kg": peak_nox,
        "NOx总量_kg": total_nox,
        "NOx小时均值_kg": mean_nox,
        "NOx峰值时间": str(peak_nox_timestamp),
        "峰值距2025-06-10_00时的小时数": peak_nox_offset_hours
    })
